update: Recommendation Hub  is a centralized page on Google Cloud that helps you view all of your recommendations in one place. We recently made improvements to the page, including enabling organization and folder-view of recommendations, custom sorting and filtering of recommendations, and more. For more information, see  documentation
Service limit (quota) recommender  is now generally available.
Change risk recommendations  are now available in Preview. These recommendations help you reduce the risk of cloud infrastructure misconfigurations.
You can now  configure the observation period for your idle VM Recommender .

The  BigQuery partitioning and clustering recommender  is now in  Preview . The recommender analyzes your BigQuery tables to identify partitioning or clustering opportunities for potential cost savings.
New  Service limit (quota) recommender  is now available in Preview. The recommendations help you identify resources that may be approaching their quota limits.
Recommendations can now be  exported  to non-US regions.
The export to BigQuery feature  now supports custom pricing and non-project scoped recommendations.
The ability to dismiss a recommendation is generally available  via Recommender API
The global  Recommender Viewer role  is now available to get view access to all insights and recommendations available.
Cloud Functions  minimum instances recommendations  are now available in  Preview .

Preview : The Error Reporting  notification recommender  looks for
recent crashes in your Cloud project and provides recommendations if you
have not configured  Error Reporting notifications .

Recommender  pricing  is now generally available and determines how you can process and view recommendations using the API and BigQuery export.
The pricing controls how much read and write  quota  is provided to individual resources.

The  product suggestion recommender  helps you to optimize your Cloud usage by providing you with product suggestions. This can help you improve performance and security, and manage your resources better.
The  committed use discount  (CUD) recommender helps you to optimize the resource costs of your Compute Engine virtual machine instances. The CUD recommendations are now generally available.

Firewall Insights enable you to better understand and safely optimize your firewall configurations. These insights are now generally available and you can learn more about how to use these insights  here .

Compute Engine now enables you to  view and apply recommendations  associated with idle resources such as disk images and IP addresses. This helps to minimize the wastage of resources and reduce the Compute bill.
You can now  opt out of recommendations  for a specific billing account.
You can use  insights  to focus on important patterns in resource usage. Insights are now generally available.

You can now view, prioritize, and apply recommendations in the Google Cloud Console using Recommendation Hub ( Beta ). 
 Get started with Recommendation Hub .
The  Transparency and Control Center  helps an administrator download processed data to view insights and recommendations.
Insights is now available in beta. See the  documentation  for details.
Recommender API is now generally available.
Recommender API is now available in Beta.
